title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos had the most views yesterday on YouTube?
questions.explanation:

BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video)  MIKU KOBATO — Views: 46,005 | Yesterday: 3
BAND-MAID / New Album "Epic Narratives" (Official Teaser Video) — Views: 26,572 | Yesterday: 2
